task_completion.description: Construct at least 2 partition walls to separate rooms and apply distinct floor colors/textures to at least 3 different zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan view, observe at least 2 newly drawn interior walls creating separate rooms (washing and break rooms). In the 3D view or 2D plan, observe at least 3 distinct floor colors or textures applied to different areas.

task_completion.description: Place 6 styling stations (chair + desk/table), a reception desk, 3 waiting seats, and 4 retail display shelves.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, count at least 6 pairs of chairs and tables/desks, 1 reception desk, 3 chairs/seats in a waiting area, and 4 shelving units.

task_completion.description: Place at least 2 sinks in the washing station zone and at least 1 kitchen appliance in the staff break room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan or 3D view, identify at least 2 sink units in one separated area and at least 1 kitchen appliance (e.g., refrigerator, oven, microwave) in another separated area.

task_completion.description: Decorate with at least 4 light fixtures and 3 plants, and label the zones using at least 4 text labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan view, look for at least 4 text labels (e.g., 'Reception', 'Styling Floor'). Also, count at least 4 lighting fixtures and 3 plant items placed in the design.
The Sweet Home 3D window title bar should display 'salon_design.sh3d', or a terminal/file explorer window shows the file 'salon_design.sh3d' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to design the salon rather than generating the file via a script or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application open with the design actively being built, showing the furniture catalog, 2D plan, and 3D view.

integrity.description: The furniture, walls, and labels are genuinely placed in the 3D environment, not mocked up using image editing or text overlays.
integrity.visual_evidence: Elements should appear native to the Sweet Home 3D interface, with proper 3D rendering, selection boxes, or catalog icons visible.

integrity.description: The agent started from the provided hair_salon_project.sh3d building shell rather than a completely blank project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The outer building shell (exterior walls/windows) should match a pre-existing structure, rather than being drawn completely from scratch in an empty grid.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying 'hair_salon_project.sh3d' in Sweet Home 3D. The final design must contain exactly or more than: 6 styling stations (chair + table/desk), 1 reception desk, 3 waiting seats, 4 retail shelves, 2 washing sinks, 1 kitchen appliance, 4 light fixtures, 3 plants, 2 partition walls, 3 distinct floor colors/textures, and 4 text labels. The project must be saved as 'salon_design.sh3d'. The verifier allocates points across 5 categories (25, 20, 20, 20, 15), totaling 100 points.
